lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor surface scratches but is free of significant dents. The interior is clean with light wear on the upholstery. All mechanical systems are functional.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any paint chips, scratches, or dents. The interior is like new with no signs of wear on the upholstery or controls. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order and the vehicle has been maintained according to the manufacturer's schedule.

This vehicle is in truly mint condition, representing the pinnacle of its model's preservation. The exterior paint is flawless, retaining its original showroom shine with no chips, scratches, or dents. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the upholstery shows zero signs of wear, and all electronic components and accessories function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance. The engine runs exceptionally quiet and powerful, while the transmission provides seamless, precise shifts. It has been meticulously maintained with a complete service history and has always been garage-kept. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Looking for a reliable ride that offers great value? This dependable vehicle is ready for its next adventure! While it shows some honest wear and tear from its years on the road, it remains a sturdy and functional choice for your daily commute. It’s a practical, hardworking car that’s ready to get you where you need to go!
Good condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unrivaled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, having been meticulously curated and maintained to the most exacting standards. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior appointments, reflects a commitment to absolute preservation. We invite the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle that transcends the typical pre-owned market, offering an experience indistinguishable from its original debut.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been meticulously cared for, always garaged, and drives like a total dream. You won’t find a single scratch or dent on this beauty. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love every mile in it!

Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Single owner. Full service records. Flawless interior and exterior.

Presented in showroom-equivalent condition, this vehicle is a pristine example of meticulous automotive care. The exterior finish remains factory-fresh, boasting a deep, mirror-like luster without a single swirl mark, stone chip, or blemish, having been strictly garage-kept and protected with a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is flawless and retains its original 'new car' scent; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero signs of wear, and every electronic component and switch functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is impeccable, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history performed exclusively by authorized specialists. It has never been driven in inclement weather and remains entirely original, down to the factory floor mats. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a truly flawless machine that requires absolutely nothing but a new home.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, reflecting a meticulous ownership history. Offered in peerless condition, it represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver seeking uncompromising excellence.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear or compromise to its aesthetic integrity. Its mechanical performance is flawless, reflecting a history of meticulous care and preservation. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands a vehicle indistinguishable from its original factory state.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this absolute gem I’m parting with! It’s in such incredible, showroom condition—I’ve babied this car since day one, and it honestly looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. Not a single scratch or speck of dust to be found; it’s just pristine. I'm so excited for the next owner to get behind the wheel and feel how smooth it is. Come take a look and fall in love with your new ride!
Used car. Condition: mint.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Single owner. No accidents. Clean title. Full maintenance records included.

This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in truly showroom-pristine condition. Meticulously maintained and strictly garage-kept, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, swirl marks, or stone chips. The alloy wheels are flawless, wrapped in premium tires with near-full tread. Inside, the cabin remains in a factory-fresh state; the leather seats are supple without any creasing, and the interior still retains its original new-car scent. Every electronic feature and driver-assist system functions perfectly. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a complete service history from the dealership and a smooth, powerful drive that feels exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. No leaks, no rattles, and no compromises. This is the definitive example for a collector or an enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been preserved in showroom condition, exhibiting zero cosmetic or mechanical imperfections. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it represents the pinnacle of its class. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing short of perfection, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in automotive excellence.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, preserved in impeccable, showroom condition. This specimen exhibits the highest standards of automotive maintenance, with every detail reflecting a legacy of fastidious care. An investment-grade opportunity for the most discerning buyer seeking a truly pristine driving experience.

Hey there! You’ve seriously got to see this beauty—it’s honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s still in absolutely pristine, flawless shape inside and out. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person! I’m so excited for the next owner to get behind the wheel and enjoy it as much as I have. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering an investment-grade E46 M3 in pristine, collector-quality condition. This specimen features the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six, utilizing individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing to deliver a linear 333 hp power band up to an 8,000 RPM redline. The drivetrain is anchored by a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual gearbox and a variable M differential lock, ensuring mechanical purity. This vehicle has undergone comprehensive preventative maintenance, including a Beisan VANOS overhaul, rod bearing replacement, and a professionally reinforced rear subframe. The chassis remains rigid and the suspension geometry is true to factory specifications. With original paint depth and an immaculate, bone-dry undercarriage, this is a turn-key example
Mint condition. Single owner. Clean title. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Interior and exterior are flawless.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a true collector-grade specimen that remains in showroom condition. The exterior paint is absolutely flawless, finished with a deep, mirror-like luster and protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating; you will find no stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings here. Always stored in a climate-controlled environment, the rubber seals and trim remain supple and dark. Inside, the cabin is pristine, featuring premium leather bolsters that show zero signs of wear and original carpets protected by factory mats since day one. Every electronic feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium sound system, operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a meticulous service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule by certified technicians. The engine bay is detailed and spotless, and the undercarriage is as clean as the body. This is a turnkey vehicle for the most discerning buyer who demands perfection in both aesthetics and performance.

We are pleased to present this exemplary motorcar, maintained to the most exacting standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical system has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience that is indistinguishable from new. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and prestige.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Presented in immaculate showroom condition, it features a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our uncompromising standards for excellence. This is an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a truly peerless driving experience.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in stunning condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken meticulous care of it, and it's been garage-kept since day one. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically flawless and ready for a new home, this is the one. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering an exceptional 996.2 Carrera, powered by a 3.6L naturally aspirated flat-six with a documented LN Engineering IMS bearing retrofit. This specimen features a G96 6-speed manual transaxle and a factory-optioned limited-slip differential for superior power distribution. Recent mechanical overhaul includes a full cooling system refresh and a bore scope confirmation of pristine cylinder walls. The chassis is dialed in with Bilstein PSS10 adjustable coilovers, maintaining perfect corner-balanced geometry. The exterior retains its factory-correct paint depth with zero orange peel or oxidation, while the cabin showcases immaculate leather bolsters and a short-throw shifter. This is a mechanically transparent, collector-grade example with linear throttle response and precise turn-in characteristics.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint and interior. Full service history included. Clean title.

This vehicle is a pristine example of automotive excellence, meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state, featuring supple, unscuffed leather and that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic component functions flawlessly, and the mechanical performance is smooth and responsive, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history from the original dealership. With exceptionally low mileage and a clean, accident-free history, this car offers the rare opportunity to own a pre-owned vehicle that feels truly brand new.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, this vehicle remains in an impeccable state that rivals its original showroom debut. Every detail, from the pristine exterior finish to the flawlessly preserved interior, reflects a standard of care that is exceedingly rare. This is a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle of peerless quality and mechanical integrity. We invite you to experience a level of refinement that defines the upper echelon of the pre-owned market.
